query: SELECT id, name, atollId, difficulty, maxDepth, minDepth, description, marineLife, bestSeason, rating FROM activity_spots WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' ORDER BY atollId, name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, atollId, difficulty, maxDepth, minDepth, description, marineLife, bestSeason, rating FROM activity_spots WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' ORDER BY atollId, name;

rows.name: Ari Atoll Housereef
rows.description: House reef with gentle slopes and abundant marine life. Excellent night diving location.

rows.name: Artificial Reef
rows.description: Sunken ship and artificial structures creating unique dive site. Good for photography and exploration.

rows.name: Banana Reef
rows.description: Iconic banana-shaped reef with excellent coral formations and abundant fish life. Perfect for beginners and intermediate divers.

rows.name: Banana Reef
rows.description: Reef with abundant marine life

rows.name: Bathala Thila
rows.description: Colorful reef life

rows.name: Dhiffushi Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with good coral formations and consistent marine life encounters.

rows.name: Dhiffushi Reef
rows.description: Gentle reef with excellent coral and abundant small fish. Perfect for beginners.

rows.name: Dhigurah Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with good coral and fish populations. Suitable for intermediate divers.

rows.name: Dhigurah Reef
rows.description: Sloping reef with excellent coral formations and abundant marine life.

rows.name: Felidhoo Kandu
rows.description: Challenging drift dive with strong currents. Excellent for experienced divers.

rows.name: Felidhoo Reef
rows.description: Sloping reef with excellent coral and diverse fish species.

rows.name: Fesdu Kandu
rows.description: Gentle channel with abundant marine life

rows.name: Fish Head
rows.description: Sharks and large pelagics

rows.name: Fotteyo Kandu
rows.description: Channel with strong currents

rows.name: Fulidhoo House Reef
rows.description: Beautiful house reef with excellent coral formations and diverse marine life. Perfect for all skill levels with shallow areas for beginners and deeper sections for advanced divers.

rows.name: Fulidhoo House Reef
rows.description: Beautiful house reef with excellent coral formations and diverse marine life. Perfect for all skill levels with shallow areas for beginners and deeper sections for advanced divers.

rows.name: Fulidhoo Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with moderate currents and beautiful coral formations.

rows.name: Fulidhoo Reef
rows.description: Gentle reef perfect for beginners and relaxed diving.

rows.name: Haa Alifu Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with moderate currents and beautiful coral formations.

rows.name: Haa Alifu Reef
rows.description: Gentle reef perfect for beginners and certification dives.

rows.name: Hanifaru Bay
rows.description: Manta ray aggregation site

rows.name: Hanifaru Bay Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with manta ray encounters (seasonal). Beautiful coral formations.
rows.marineLife: Manta rays, eagle rays, grouper, sharks

rows.name: Hanifaru Bay Reef
rows.description: Gentle reef with excellent coral and abundant marine life.

rows.name: Hinnavaru Kandu
rows.description: Challenging drift dive with strong currents and large pelagic fish.

rows.name: Hinnavaru Reef
rows.description: Sloping reef with excellent coral and diverse fish species.

rows.name: Hulhumale Reef
rows.description: Convenient dive site near airport. Good for beginners and quick dives.

rows.name: Kandooma Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with moderate currents and excellent coral formations.

rows.name: Kandooma Reef
rows.description: Sloping reef with excellent coral and abundant marine life.

rows.name: Kuda Rah Thila
rows.description: Turtles and eagle rays

rows.name: Maaya Thila
rows.description: Night dive hotspot

rows.name: Madivaru Kandu
rows.description: Powerful drift dive through a channel. Strong currents attract large pelagic fish and sharks.

rows.name: Malé Reef
rows.description: Steep wall dive with excellent coral coverage and pelagic fish. Suitable for intermediate divers.

rows.name: Maradhoo Kandu
rows.description: Deep channel dive with strong currents and large pelagics

rows.name: Maradhoo Kandu
rows.description: Deep channel dive

rows.name: Miyaru Kandu
rows.description: Fast-moving channel with sharks and rays

rows.name: Miyaru Kandu
rows.description: Drift dive through a channel with strong currents. Great for experienced divers seeking pelagic encounters.
rows.marineLife: Manta rays, eagle rays, trevally, sharks

rows.name: Naifaru Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with moderate currents and beautiful coral walls.

rows.name: Naifaru Reef
rows.description: Gentle reef perfect for beginners and relaxed diving.

rows.name: Rasdhoo Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with moderate currents and excellent coral formations. Good for intermediate divers.

rows.name: Thoddoo Kandu
rows.description: Challenging drift dive with strong currents. Excellent for experienced divers seeking pelagic encounters.

rows.name: Thoddoo Reef
rows.description: Sloping reef with excellent coral formations and diverse fish species.

rows.name: Ukulhas Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with moderate currents and beautiful coral walls.

rows.name: Ukulhas Reef
rows.description: Gentle sloping reef perfect for beginners and certification dives.

rows.name: Vaavu Kandu
rows.description: Channel dive with reef sharks and turtles

rows.name: Veligandu Kandu
rows.description: Scenic channel dive with colorful reef

rows.name: Veligandu Kandu
rows.description: Beautiful channel with steep walls and abundant marine life. Popular for manta ray encounters.
rows.marineLife: Manta rays, eagle rays, grouper, sharks

rows.name: Veligandu Reef
rows.description: Gentle reef perfect for beginners and relaxed diving.

rows.name: Banana Reef
rows.description: One of the most famous dive sites in the Maldives, Banana Reef is a stunning coral formation that attracts divers of all levels. The site features vibrant coral gardens, abundant fish life, and excellent visibility.

rows.name: Kandooma Thila
rows.description: A spectacular thila (underwater mountain) dive site featuring a pinnacle that rises from 60m to 15m. Known for excellent visibility and encounters with large pelagic fish.
rows.bestSeason: March to May, September to November

rows.name: Manta Point
rows.description: World-renowned manta ray encounter site where seasonal aggregations of manta rays gather to feed. One of the most magical diving experiences in the world.

rows.name: Hanifaru Bay
rows.description: UNESCO Biosphere Reserve famous for massive seasonal gatherings of manta rays and whale sharks. A truly unique diving and snorkeling destination.
rows.bestSeason: June to November (manta season), March to May (whale sharks)

rows.name: Equatorial Channel
rows.description: Thrilling drift dive through a channel with strong currents and abundant pelagic fish. One of the most exciting dives in the Maldives.
rows.bestSeason: March to May, September to November

rows.name: Whale Shark Point
rows.description: Seasonal whale shark encounters in a protected area. Excellent snorkeling and diving opportunities to observe these gentle giants.

rows.name: Equatorial Channel South
rows.description: Advanced drift dive in the southernmost atoll with world-class diving conditions and abundant marine life.
rows.bestSeason: March to May, September to November
